catalog.title: Deep Work Starter
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: A minimal starter pack with a single deep-work block rule. Mirrors the app's built-in deep-work template.

catalog.title: Student Canvas
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Reward credits on assignment submission and good grades; block social apps when an assignment is due within 24h. Built for Canvas LMS users.

catalog.title: Developer Flow
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Credit meaningful code output (merged PRs, closed issues), streak daily commits, gentle intervention when you're bouncing between repos.

catalog.title: Sleep Hygiene
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Hard lockdown on entertainment apps 23:00–06:00, streak rewards for reporting ≥7h sleep, gentle intervention when sleep debt grows.

catalog.title: Gym Routine
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Event-triggered credits for completed workouts, block social during scheduled sessions, maintain weekly streak consistency.

catalog.title: Reading Habit
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Schedule-triggered reading-time suggestions with daily streak tracking. Credit grants on highlight creation (Readwise integration).

catalog.title: Research & Writing
catalog.author: focalpoint-team
catalog.description: Morning deep-work blocks (9–11am weekdays) with hard social block. Event-triggered credits on code commits and document edits. Deadline lockdown when calendar has a 'deadline' event within 24h.
